problem.line1: Your mind never stops. And yet, you still forget things.
problem.line2: It's not a lack of discipline.

solution.line1: takes care of remembering, organizing, and executing for you.
solution.line3: Memorae saves it, organizes it, and acts when it is time.
solution.channelsIntro: In the channel you already use: WhatsApp, Telegram, email, or the Memorae App.

ui.guaranteeDesc: Try Memorae risk-free. If you're not satisfied within 14 days, we'll refund your payment. No questions asked.
ui.supernovaHeading: Everything you can unlock with the Supernova
ui.faqSubheading: Have questions? We answer them here.

chaos.heading: Chaos won't win twice.
chaos.subheading: We're not here to create just another app.
chaos.card1: We don't organize lives: we decompress them.
chaos.card3: We're not just an app. We're a shift in logic.
chaos.card4: What we are creating doesn't exist.

footer.tagline: You just live. Memorae remembers for you.
footer.subtitle: Your to-do list asked us for help. Here we are.

seo.title: Memorae | Your personal memory assistant
seo.description: Memorae helps you remember, organize, and act. Unlimited reminders, smart lists, and AI-powered memory across WhatsApp, Telegram, email, and the Memorae App.
